tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: CCBot bridges Telegram Forum topics to Claude Code sessions via tmux windows. Each topic maps to a tmux window running one Claude Code instance.

tour.title: Entry Point & Configuration
tour.description: main.py starts the bot with logging and rate limiting. The Config class reads environment variables for tokens, paths, and settings.

tour.title: Core Bot & Auth
tour.description: bot.py orchestrates all handlers, manages user authorization, creates tmux windows, and routes messages/text/voice/photos. auth.py handles user authentication checks.

tour.title: Session & State Management
tour.description: SessionManager tracks thread-to-window bindings. MonitorState manages read offsets for JSONL log tailing. SessionMonitor polls Claude Code logs for new messages.

tour.title: Terminal & Tmux Integration
tour.description: TmuxManager wraps libtmux for window create/manage/kill. TerminalParser extracts interactive UIs, status lines, and bash output. TranscriptParser decodes Claude Code JSONL entries.

tour.title: Message Pipeline & Notifications
tour.description: Messages flow through the queue system with merging. MessageSender handles Telegram API calls with MarkdownV2. Notifications broadcast session events. message_handlers processes incoming text/commands.

tour.title: Interactive UI & Callback Routing
tour.description: Interactive UI handles AskUserQuestion/ExitPlanMode/Permission prompts via inline keyboards. callback_router dispatches callback queries. screenshot_controls manages terminal screenshots.

tour.title: Testing Infrastructure
tour.description: Tests cover unit tests per module and integration tests. Fixtures provide sample terminal output, JSONL entries, and mock bots.
